mapper.select:
SELECT da.*, CASE WHEN CURDATE() < da.ngay_bat_dau THEN 'Chưa thực hiện'
WHEN da.ngay_ket_thuc_thuc_te IS NOT NULL AND da.ngay_ket_thuc_thuc_te <= da.ngay_ket_thuc_du_kien THEN 'Đúng hạn'
WHEN da.ngay_ket_thuc_thuc_te IS NOT NULL AND da.ngay_ket_thuc_thuc_te > da.ngay_ket_thuc_du_kien THEN 'Trễ hạn'
ELSE 'Đang thực hiện' END AS trang_thai FROM du_an da
AND da.ten_du_an LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tenDuAn}, '%')
AND LAST_DAY( STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{nam}, '-', #{thang}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') ) >= da.ngay_bat_dau AND STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{nam}, '-', #{thang}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') <= IFNULL(da.ngay_ket_thuc_thuc_te, '9999-12-31')
ORDER BY da.ngay_bat_dau DESC

SELECT count(*) FROM du_an da
AND da.ten_du_an LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tenDuAn}, '%')
AND LAST_DAY( STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{nam}, '-', #{thang}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') ) >= da.ngay_bat_dau AND STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{nam}, '-', #{thang}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') <= IFNULL(da.ngay_ket_thuc_thuc_te, '9999-12-31')

SELECT cd.*, CASE WHEN CURDATE() < cd.ngay_bat_dau THEN 'Chưa thực hiện'
WHEN cd.ngay_hoan_thanh_thuc_te IS NOT NULL AND cd.ngay_hoan_thanh_thuc_te <= cd.ngay_hoan_thanh_du_kien THEN 'Đúng hạn'
WHEN cd.ngay_hoan_thanh_thuc_te IS NOT NULL AND cd.ngay_hoan_thanh_thuc_te > cd.ngay_hoan_thanh_du_kien THEN 'Trễ hạn'
ELSE 'Đang thực hiện' END AS trang_thai_tien_do
FROM cong_doan cd WHERE cd.ma_du_an = #{maDuAn} ORDER BY cd.thu_tu
